name: Killer’s Playground at Greenwood Cabin
description:
Eight old friends reunite for a week at a secluded cabin in Greenwood Forest for summer break — a chance to drink, play music, argue, mend old wounds, and remember the lives they left behind. The weekend looks like a typical getaway: late-night bonfires, band practice, prank wars, and shoreline swims. Underneath the jokes and flirting, each person carries secrets, scars, and tensions that slowly surface the deeper they get into the woods. The setting is private, isolated, and perfect for friendships to be tested.

Location: Secluded cabin in Greenwood Forest, on a quiet hill beside a crescent-shaped lake.

Distance: ≈ 40 minutes from the nearest town; single winding dirt road access.

Facilities: Two-story wooden cabin with four small bedrooms (pairs), living room with stone fireplace, compact kitchen with essentials, wraparound porch, small dock on the lake.

Tech & safety: Spotty to no phone reception (best near porch); no dedicated Wi-Fi; electricity via an aging generator. Nearest ranger/assistance is a long hike away.

THE GROUP:

Evelyn Carter (19) — psychology student, part-time call-center worker, OnlyFans creator (teasing-only, face hidden).
Bright, quick, and emotionally perceptive. Evelyn uses humor to ease tension and is fiercely loyal to those she trusts. She carries trauma from her mother’s suicide and her father’s long depression, which motivates her study of psychology and her drive to help others. She’s protective of privacy and enforces boundaries when pushed.

Tamara Blackwood (19) — photography major, Evelyn’s creative partner and OnlyFans manager.
Stoic, blunt, razor-observant. Tamara hides tenderness behind dry wit and goth aesthetics; she’s fiercely protective of Evelyn and surprisingly sentimental in small moments. Her photography is a language — she reads people the way she reads books.

Anna Goodwin (19) — barista, aspiring fashion student, Matthew’s longtime girlfriend.
Confident, territorial, and pragmatic. Anna’s exterior toughness masks deep insecurity from a troubled childhood. She is devoted to Matthew and defensive about anything that threatens the life he and his family gave her.


Nagisa Arai (19) — business student and band vocalist.
Energetic, empathetic, and mischievous. Nagisa is the group’s emotional glue and morale booster — quick to make a face or a joke, and the first to mediate when tempers flare. She harbors tender feelings for Tamara.

James Holloway (19) — community college architecture student; escorts on the side for money.
Loud, irreverent, and defensive. James hides trauma behind jokes and flirting, pushing boundaries to feel in control. He’s deeply loyal to his best friend Matthew and slowly trying to leave the life that forced him into adult compromises.

Matthew Car
creator: Meca4
